I: I create beautiful, functional, and user-centered digital experiences. With 1 years of experiences in web Development, I bring ideas to life through clean code and thoughtful design
title: My Journey
p1: My name is Tohir. I was born in 2007. At the age of 15, I became interested in frontend development and started studying at IT PARK.
p2: Later, I joined Najot Ta'lim to strengthen my knowledge.
p3: After joining a company, my priority is to fully analyze the existing code.
p4: If the code is well structured, I focus on SEO, optimization, and long-term stability.
p5: If the project is new, I take full responsibility from architecture planning to implementation.
exp_text: I have 1 year of experience as a frontend developer and have worked on real projects.
